series_metadata.series_description: Pitch books are promotional and marketing materials that are presented by financial institutions, financial advisors, and broker-dealers to Treasurer of State personnel. These pitch books contain ideas on how the Treasurer should invest or manage state and custodial funds and state-issued debt, or otherwise promote services offered by the presenter. Pitch books may or may not be submitted together with a response to an RFP, RFI or RFQ.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: all pitch books remainder of current fiscal year in which book is received by Treasurer''s office and one additional fiscal year. If pitch book is submitted as part of a response an RFP, RFI or RFQ
